import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let lines = string.split(input, "\n")
mut sum = 0
mut i = 0
while i < lines.len()
  let line = match lines.get(i)
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  if tokens.len() >= 2
    let tok = match tokens.get(1)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      "0"
    end
    let n = match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    sum = sum + n
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("sum=#{sum}")
